name: sop-product-launch
description: Complete product launch workflow coordinating 15+ specialist agents across research, development, marketing, sales, and operations. Uses sequential and parallel orchestration for 10-week launch timeline.
capabilities: Orchestrates 15+ specialized agents across launch phases
Coordinates sequential and parallel task execution
Manages 10-week structured timeline with defined deliverables
Integrates memory storage for cross-agent data sharing
Provides complete workflow from research to post-launch monitoring
author: DNYoussef
securitySummary: All 63 static findings are false positives. This is a documentation-only skill containing JavaScript pseudocode examples in markdown code blocks. The scanner misidentified JavaScript template literals (backticks) as shell execution, content hashes as cryptographic algorithms, and memory namespace references as system reconnaissance. No executable code, network calls, file operations, or external commands exist.
valueStatement: Product launches require coordinating multiple teams and tasks over months. This skill orchestrates 15+ specialized AI agents to handle research, development, marketing, sales, and operations in a systematic 10-week timeline.
userTitle: Launch products with AI agent orchestration

useCases.title: Complete startup product launch
useCases.description: Coordinate all aspects of launching a new product from market research through post-launch optimization

useCases.title: Enterprise feature rollout
useCases.description: Manage complex feature launches requiring coordination across development, marketing, and sales teams

useCases.title: Client product launches
useCases.description: Deliver structured product launches for clients with predictable timelines and deliverables

promptTemplates.title: Basic product launch
promptTemplates.prompt: Use sop-product-launch to orchestrate a complete product launch for our new project management SaaS tool targeting remote teams

promptTemplates.title: Feature enhancement launch
promptTemplates.prompt: Coordinate launch of our AI-powered analytics feature including API updates, documentation, and marketing campaign

promptTemplates.title: Multi-platform launch
promptTemplates.prompt: Execute synchronized launch across web app, iOS and Android apps, and public API with coordinated marketing push

promptTemplates.title: Enterprise rollout
promptTemplates.prompt: Manage enterprise product launch including compliance audits, security reviews, sales enablement, and customer onboarding

bestPractices: Customize agent assignments based on your specific product requirements
Store critical data in memory namespaces for cross-phase retrieval
Run weekly reviews to track progress against success metrics
antiPatterns: Do not skip market research phase as it drives all downstream decisions
Avoid running all tasks in parallel without considering dependencies
Do not ignore post-launch monitoring as optimization continues after launch

faq.question: Is this compatible with standard Claude Code?
faq.answer: Yes, the skill uses standard Task calls and memory storage that work with Claude Code and compatible frameworks

faq.question: Can I adjust the 10-week timeline?
faq.answer: The timeline is structured but phases can be compressed or extended based on product complexity and team size

faq.question: How does agent coordination work?
faq.answer: The skill uses sequential workflows for dependent tasks and parallel execution for independent work streams

faq.question: Is my product data safe during the launch?
faq.answer: All data is stored in your local memory namespaces, no external services or data transmission is required

faq.question: What if some agents are unavailable?
faq.answer: The workflow can adapt by reassigning tasks to available agents or running tasks sequentially instead of parallel

faq.question: How does this compare to traditional project management?
faq.answer: Unlike static Gantt charts, this skill provides active agent orchestration with real-time adaptation and memory-based coordination
